task: Move the green napkin from left end to right end of the table.
raw:
Scene: green_napkin, blue_brush, yellow_object, metal_bowl, table
Step 1: reach(green_napkin)
  affordance_region: the green napkin on the left side of the table
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_napkin, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_napkin) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_napkin)
  affordance_region: the corner of the green napkin
  contact: holding(green_napkin) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_napkin)
Step 3: transport(green_napkin -> right_end_of_table)
  affordance_region: the right end of the wooden table
  spatial: above(green_napkin, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_napkin)
  done_when: above(green_napkin, table, 0.05) AND aligned_xy(green_napkin, right_end_of_table, 0.03)
Step 4: place(green_napkin -> right_end_of_table)
  affordance_region: the right end of the wooden table
  contact: surface_contact(green_napkin, table) [completion]; released(green_napkin) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_napkin) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_napkin, table) AND released(green_napkin) AND stable(green_napkin)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the green napkin on the left side of the table
the corner of the green napkin
the right end of the wooden table
the right end of the wooden table
steps.done_when: surface_contact(green_napkin, table) AND released(green_napkin) AND stable(green_napkin)
